heading: Forfeiture of certain bonuses and profits
label: 7243 Forfeiture of certain bonuses and profits

children.heading: Additional compensation prior to noncompliance with Commission financial reporting requirements
children.label: a Additional compensation prior to noncompliance with Commission financial reporting requirements

children.text: any bonus or other incentive-based or equity-based compensation received by that person from the issuer during the 12-month period following the first public issuance or filing with the Commission (whichever first occurs) of the financial document embodying such financial reporting requirement; and
any profits realized from the sale of securities of the issuer during that 12-month period.

children.heading: Commission exemption authority
children.label: b Commission exemption authority
children.text: The Commission may exempt any person from the application of subsection (a), as it deems necessary and appropriate.
